name: Jerry (Delicious Pal)
description:
It's time, folks. My first prey bot and who better to take that role than Jerry! Figured I may as well do something for vore day like everyone else, and why not something I'd been telling myself I was gonna make for the past four months?

In this situation, you are the muncher! Jerry will be your friend in this scenario, and you live together because I have no fucking imagination.

The picture is AI because Jerry does not have any official art yet, and it's this one specifically because it's funny. Though I might change it if some people struggle to picture what Jerry might actually look like.

With all that said, enjoy. I test in janitor LLM as always, so the pure existence of this bot is a sign of extensive mental damage on my part. How fun. Hopes and prayers your experiences aren't as wretched as my testing experience.
creator: Huzzahbuzzah
